profile.name: Mano Harsha Sappa
profile.title: Analytics Engineer | Data Engineer | BI Engineer
profile.summary: Analytics Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable data pipelines, analytics models, and reporting systems across healthcare and financial domains. Skilled in Snowflake, dbt, SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, and DataOps practices, with a strong focus on data quality, automation, and business-facing analytics. Currently pursuing a Master of Science in Data Analytics Engineering at George Mason University.

experience.description: Builds scalable healthcare data pipelines and analytics models that improve data availability, reporting reliability, and downstream business insights for operational and analytics teams.
achievements: Improved data availability by 35% by strengthening ELT workflows, transformation layers, and pipeline reliability.
Designed scalable Snowflake and dbt data models for healthcare reporting and operational analytics.
Implemented Python-based anomaly detection and validation workflows to reduce reporting errors in production.

experience.description: Delivered business intelligence solutions, curated analytics layers, and dashboard reporting workflows for enterprise stakeholders using standardized metrics and self-service reporting patterns.
achievements: Reduced manual reporting effort by 50% through standardized KPI definitions and curated reporting layers.
Improved reporting turnaround time by 60% by enabling self-service dashboard workflows for non-technical users.
Partnered with business teams to translate reporting needs into scalable analytics assets and dashboard solutions.

experience.description: Supported data reporting, analytics automation, and performance monitoring initiatives by working with structured datasets, reporting workflows, and stakeholder-facing metrics.
achievements: Automated recurring reporting tasks and improved consistency of business-facing metrics.
Built reusable analysis workflows that supported operational reporting and business decision-making.
Strengthened data preparation and reporting processes across cross-functional project work.

projects.title: Healthcare ELT Pipeline Modernization
projects.description: Designed an end-to-end ELT workflow using Snowflake, dbt, SQL, and AWS S3 to move raw healthcare data into curated analytical models for reporting and business decision-making.
projects.impact: Improved data availability by 35%, strengthened reliability, and created scalable curated marts for operational and analytics teams.

projects.title: Python-Based Data Quality and Anomaly Detection Framework
projects.description: Built Python validation and anomaly detection workflows that compare current pipeline outputs against historical patterns to identify missing values, outliers, and quality issues after each ELT cycle.
projects.impact: Reduced reporting errors by 20% and improved trust in production reporting workflows.

projects.title: Self-Service Analytics Dashboard Program
projects.description: Created curated reporting layers and executive-friendly dashboards with drill-down features so business users could analyze performance without depending on ad hoc SQL support.
projects.impact: Reduced manual reporting work by 50% and improved turnaround time by 60% for business reporting requests.

projects.title: Interview Practice Chatbot
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted interview trainer that generates one interview question at a time, provides sample answers, and explains how strong responses should be structured.
projects.impact: Created a focused practice experience for interview preparation with realistic interviewer-style prompts and structured coaching guidance.
